---
title: "Anna Jane Seymour"
---

## Anna Jane Seymour

**Maiden name:** (Fair)

### Description

missionary

### Biography

She married (1879) Charles Henry Seymour.  She was one of the women who sailed to South Africa with Mary Anderson Morshead and Bishop Robert Gray in 1868, and the dedicatee of Morshead\'s <i>Robert Gray</i>; see her account there of work at Clewer.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 26th [1868]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
